query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_leads FROM leads; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users FROM users; SELECT COUNT(*) as leads_teste FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as users_teste FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%Teste%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%Batch%' OR name LIKE '%Rank%';
